summary: Password visibility toggle and Forgot/Reset Password flow testing completed. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 UI features verified working correctly including eye icon toggles on all password fields and forgot/reset password pages.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/forgot-password with valid email returns 200 with success message
POST /api/auth/forgot-password with non-existent email returns same 200 (no email enumeration)
POST /api/auth/forgot-password with missing email returns 422 validation error
POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid token returns 400
POST /api/auth/reset-password with expired token returns 400
POST /api/auth/reset-password with wrong token type returns 400
POST /api/auth/reset-password with valid token but short password returns 400
POST /api/auth/reset-password with valid token resets password successfully
POST /api/auth/reset-password with valid token for non-existent user returns 400
UI: Login page password visibility toggle works (password <-> text)
UI: Login page 'Mot de passe oublié ?' link navigates to /forgot-password
UI: Register page password visibility toggle works
UI: Register page confirm password visibility toggle works
UI: Account page current password visibility toggle works
UI: Account page new password visibility toggle works
UI: Account page confirm password visibility toggle works
UI: Forgot password page has email input, submit button, back to login link
UI: Forgot password page shows success state with checkmark after submission
UI: Reset password page without token shows 'Lien de réinitialisation invalide.'
UI: Reset password page with token shows password form with eye toggles
UI: Reset password page new password visibility toggle works
UI: Reset password page confirm password visibility toggle works
seed_data_creation: Created test users with 'TEST_pwreset_' prefix during backend testing for reset-password validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password visibility toggles and Forgot/Reset password flow fully tested. Features verified: 1) Eye icon toggles on Login page (toggle-password-visibility), Register page (toggle-password-visibility, toggle-confirm-password-visibility), Account page (toggle-current-pw, toggle-new-pw, toggle-confirm-pw), Reset password page (toggle-reset-password, toggle-reset-confirm-password). 2) Forgot password flow: POST /api/auth/forgot-password sends email via Resend, returns same success message regardless of email existence (no enumeration). 3) Reset password flow: POST /api/auth/reset-password validates JWT token with type='reset', enforces 6 char minimum. 4) UI pages use proper data-testids for all interactive elements.

forgot_password_api.security: Returns same message for existing/non-existing emails (no enumeration)
